cause_analysis.narrative: 7 Ch'i LLC churned on 2026-02-02 after 259 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-28 (sms) — first complaint keyword: "does not work". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-28 via sms. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
